column1: Before _________ Harriet, I never knew what real love was.
I'm sure that after _________ your exam, you'll feel a lot better.
Having ________ the letter, Peter printed it out.
________ through the window, I saw a strange man at the door.
I cooked dinner and, ________ that, I sat down to watch TV
________ a noise outside, Janice went to investigate.
________ my notes, I couldn't revise properly for the test.
________ quite intelligent, Matt hopes to get into a good university.
________ the start of the film, I decided not to bother watching the rest of it.
After ________ her bed, Cherie had a shower.
